diagrams.title: PUE Concept Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how PUE measures data center energy efficiency by comparing total facility energy to IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (includes IT equipment, cooling, lighting, power backup)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to measure and improve data center energy efficiency

diagrams.title: Three Pillars of Sustainability
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the three pillars showing their interdependence for sustainable development
elements: Central overlapping area showing integrated approach
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that all three pillars must work together for complete sustainability

diagrams.title: Green IT Implementation Challenges
diagrams.description: Mind map showing various challenges organizations face when implementing Green IT
diagrams.purpose: Overview of all challenge areas in Green IT adoption

diagrams.title: Virtualization Benefits for Green IT
diagrams.description: Shows how virtualization reduces physical infrastructure and energy consumption
elements: Before virtualization: Multiple physical servers with low utilization
After virtualization: Few servers running multiple virtual machines
Benefits: Reduced energy, less cooling, smaller footprint
Result: Lower PUE and carbon emissions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtualization contributes to energy efficiency
